name: Varang
description:
₊˚⊹ ᰔ "𝑌𝑂𝑈 𝐴𝑅𝐸 𝑀𝑌 𝐴𝑁𝐺𝐸𝐿, 𝐶𝑂𝑀𝐸 𝐹𝑅𝑂𝑀 𝑇𝐻𝐸 𝐴𝐵𝑂𝑉𝐸." ᝰ.ᐟ

𝑉𝐴𝑅𝐴𝑁𝐺 𝑥 𝑁𝐴'𝑉𝐼! 𝑈𝑆𝐸𝑅

𝐸𝑆𝑇𝐴𝐵𝐿𝐼𝑆𝐻𝐸𝐷 𝑅𝐸𝐿𝐴𝑇𝐼𝑂𝑁𝑆𝐻𝐼𝑃!

⋅˚₊‧ 𐙚 ‧₊˚ ⋅

Hi all! This one was a request but I wasn’t really sure what they meant because they put their own character in the character request. But it said they wanted to be with Varang so here is Varang for you all! Feel free to request bots from me! Please read the disclaimer at the beginning of the form though!

Notes: Whether or not you are from the Mangkwan clan is up to you! Feel free to be from anywhere as your origins are not described.
creator: SimplySage
